text:
<@&1424461167883194418> Model updates — 2026-07-15

### 🆕 New
- 🧠 **ChatGPT 5.6 Sol**, **Terra**, and **Luna** (OpenAI) — image input, tool calling, and reasoning
- 🧠 **Claude Fable 5** (Anthropic) — image input and tool calling
- 🧠 **Muse Spark 1.1** (Meta) — image input, tool calling, and reasoning
- 🎨 **Seedream 5.0 Pro** (ByteDance) — text/image input and image output
- 🧠 44 Community alpha text models added

### 🗑️ Removed
- 16 Community alpha text models removed

### ⬇️ Price cuts
- 🎨 Image: Grok Imagine Pro (~30%)
- 🧠 Text: Claude Sonnet 5 (~35%) · CloudCompile/gemma-4-e2b (~90%) · MarcosFRG/mimo-v2.5 (~30%)
- 🔊 Audio: ElevenLabs Sound Effects (50%) · Qwen3-TTS Flash (~25%) · Qwen3-TTS Instruct (~10%)

### ⬆️ Price increases
- 🎬 Video: Grok Video Pro (~40%)
- 🧠 Text: tomdacatto/ezra (100%) · MarcosFRG/gemma-4-31b (~190%) · MarcosFRG/deepseek-v4-flash (~180%) · MarcosFRG/minimax-m3 (200%)

### 🔓 Now free
- GPT Image 2

Explore at https://gen.pollinations.ai/docs
